case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SUHARNOKO, WIDYARASWA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-02-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SUHARNOKO, WIDYARASWA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUHARNOKO, WIDYARASWA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-06-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLTF'S REQUEST.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SUHARNOKO, WIDYARASWA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUHARNOKO, WIDYARASWA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
